rules.name: rice_butter_low_context
rules.reason: staple-fat pairing is often too generic unless strong evidence exists

rules.name: sweet_yogurt_with_herb
rules.reason: sweet dairy with herb utility is usually low-intent

rules.name: tuna_with_plain_salt
rules.reason: protein + plain utility seasoning should need stronger context

rules.name: dates_with_generic_cheese
rules.reason: dates pair better with dessert-style complements than generic cheese

rules.name: rice_with_tomato_paste_generic
rules.reason: rice with tomato paste is often too generic without stronger meal context

rules.name: rice_with_generic_chicken
rules.reason: rice and chicken should need stronger recipe or pair evidence than a broad default

rules.name: tuna_with_tomato_paste_generic
rules.reason: tuna with tomato paste is a weak generic pantry fallback without stronger context

rules.name: chips_with_generic_cheese
rules.reason: chips with cheese should be limited to genuinely strong snack evidence

rules.name: chocolate_with_plain_milk
rules.reason: sweet pairings with milk are common but too broad as universal snack defaults

rules.name: tea_with_biscuit_generic
rules.reason: tea or coffee with biscuits is plausible but too generic to rank highly by default

rules.name: milk_with_biscuit_generic
rules.reason: milk with biscuits should only survive when the milk type and evidence are clearly serving-oriented

rules.name: dessert_with_condensed_default
rules.reason: dessert plus condensed milk is often an overused sweet fallback rather than a strong recommendation
